source_pr.title: *: rename RECREATOR to REPLAYER
source_pr.body:

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28825 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

rename RECREATOR to REPLAYER


symptoms: {"PLAN REPLAYER DUMP EXPLAIN SLOW QUERY WHERE a > 10 and t < 1 ORDER BY t LIMIT 10", true, "PLAN REPLAYER DUMP EXPLAIN SLOW QUERY WHERE `a`>10 AND `t`<1 ORDER BY `t` LIMIT 10"}, (parser/parser_test.go)
failure_signature: {"PLAN REPLAYER DUMP EXPLAIN SLOW QUERY WHERE a > 10 and t < 1 ORDER BY t LIMIT 10", true, "PLAN REPLAYER DUMP EXPLAIN SLOW QUERY WHERE `a`>10 AND `t`<1 ORDER BY `t` LIMIT 10"}, (parser/parser_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is a broad rename/refactor (RECREATOR -> REPLAYER) affecting plan replayer related code and tests. The available case data does not include a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization change; treat as insufficient evidence rather than guessing a root cause.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: {"PLAN REPLAYER DUMP EXPLAIN SLOW QUERY WHERE a > 10 and t < 1 ORDER BY t LIMIT 10", true, "PLAN REPLAYER DUMP EXPLAIN SLOW QUERY WHERE `a`>10 AND `t`<1 ORDER BY `t` LIMIT 10"}, (parser/parser_test.go)
